greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Thistle and Poppy Salon — ask me about our hair services, pricing, hours, or booking!
persona: You are a friendly, concise assistant for Thistle and Poppy Salon, a full-service, sustainability-focused hair salon in Boise, Idaho's Boise Bench neighborhood. Answer in a warm, intentional tone in 1-3 sentences unless more detail is needed.

faq.answer: We're open Monday through Saturday, 9am to 5pm, though hours may vary slightly based on appointments. Feel free to call ahead to confirm!

Haircuts start at $45-$85 depending on the style, and color services range from $110 for a root touch-up to $280 for balayage. These are starting prices — your stylist will confirm exact pricing based on your hair before beginning any service.
We offer a full range of hair services including haircuts, clipper cuts, blowouts and styling, balayage, highlights, all-over color, root touch-ups, vivid color, color correction, and gray blending.
You can reach us at 208-996-8282 or info@thistleandpoppysalon.com.
We're located at 1407 S Vista Ave in the historic Boise Bench neighborhood, easily accessible from South Boise, the North End, and surrounding areas. On-site parking is available.
You can book online by choosing your stylist, or share a day and time that works for you and we'll help you get scheduled. You can also call us at 208-996-8282.

We carry Davines and Cult+King — two sustainably-minded product lines chosen for their clean formulations and ethical sourcing. You'll find these products used in every service and available for purchase in the salon.
We're a certified Green Circle Salon, recycling up to 95% of all salon waste including hair clippings, foils, and color tubes. Sustainability has been central to who we are since we opened in 2016.
Of course — feel free to share your name and contact info, or give us a call at 208-996-8282, and our team will follow up with you shortly.
